ham.subject: Important: Updated Leave Policy Effective 1 June 2024
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Hope you are doing well. As part of our continuous effort to improve work‑life balance, we have revised the company leave policy effective from 1 June 2024. Please find the key updates below:

1. **Annual Leave**: 18 days per year for all permanent employees.
2. **Sick Leave**: 10 days per year, with a maximum of 5 consecutive days.
3. **Maternity Leave**: 26 weeks (6 months) for eligible employees.
4. **Paternity Leave**: 2 weeks.
5. **Unpaid Leave**: 5 days per year for employees with 2+ years tenure.

Policy details are available on the HR portal under “Leave Policy – 2024”. For any queries, contact HR at hr@company.com or call 0123-456-789.

Please acknowledge receipt of this email by replying “Got it” by end of day.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Warm regards,
HR Department

spam.subject: URGENT: Ticket #98765 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hi [Employee Name],

Aapke account par recent login attempt detect hua hai. Security ko ensure karne ke liye, aapko ek verification step complete karna hoga.

1. Log in to the corporate portal (username & password).
2. Visit <URL> and enter the code: 4F8G5.
3. Confirm in next 10 minutes.

Agar aap is step ko complete nahi karte, to aapka account temporarily suspend ho jayega.

Koi bhi doubt ho to IT Support ko reply karein.

Thanks & Regards,
IT Support Team
